game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **The House of Da Vinci 3:** The House of Da Vinci 3 is a 3D puzzle adventure game where players navigate intricate environments by tapping on objects to interact, examine, and collect them, and swiping the screen to rotate the camera view. The core gameplay loop involves solving complex mechanical puzzles, often requiring players to manipulate multiple interactive elements, combine inventory items, or find hidden clues within the detailed scenes. A central mechanic is the "Oculus Perpetua," which players activate by tapping an on-screen icon to view and interact with past versions of the environment, altering objects or events that directly impact the present state to solve otherwise impossible puzzles. Progression is linear, with each solved puzzle unlocking access to new rooms or advancing the overarching narrative, culminating in the story's finale.
game_info.description: Navigate through Leonardo da Vinci's mysterious workshop by solving intricate mechanical puzzles across three interconnected rooms. Use the legendary Oculus Perpetua to view and manipulate the past, altering objects to affect the present timeline. Collect items, examine objects closely, and combine tools to unlock mechanisms. Each puzzle solved opens the next chamber, leading you deeper into da Vinci's secrets. Complete all three rooms to escape and uncover the final revelation.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move camera view (rotate view around the room)
Space: Interact with highlighted object / Use selected item
Z: Toggle Oculus Perpetua (view past/present)
Shift: Examine selected object closely
Number Keys (1-3): Select inventory item
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Basic navigation and interaction testing. Tests whether the player can move the camera, interact with objects, pick up items, and use the Oculus Perpetua mechanic. Validates that inventory management and object examination work correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Rotate camera systematically to explore the room. Interact with any highlighted objects to pick them up. Toggle Oculus Perpetua to see time differences. Examine items in inventory and attempt basic interactions with puzzle elements.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully navigate the camera around rooms, collect at least one item into inventory, toggle between past and present views, and interact with at least one puzzle element. Test passes if no errors occur and basic mechanics respond correctly.

TEST_2.test_description: Complete gameplay win condition test. Tests the full puzzle solution path from Room 1 through Room 3, utilizing all game mechanics including item collection, past manipulation, and puzzle solving to reach GAME_OVER_WIN state.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Execute optimal solution: Room 1 - collect gear, use Oculus to restore mechanism, place gear. Room 2 - collect key from past, unlock chest, get lens. Room 3 - use all items in correct sequence on the final device. Follow the intended puzzle solution path efficiently.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully solve all three rooms in sequence, unlock each door, and trigger the GAME_OVER_WIN condition. Test succeeds when gameState.gamePhase equals "GAME_OVER_WIN" and all rooms are marked complete within a reasonable number of frames.
